images.title: Formation Implantologie
images.revised_prompt: Create a cinematic and photorealistic image in a banner format of 16:9. Picture a modern dental clinic illuminated with warm golden lighting for a professional dental training advertisement. A middle-eastern female dentist, experienced and dressed in a white coat, is holding a dental model and providing explanations to a diverse group of audience. The entire setting resonates with premium quality, and uses a gold accent color palette, specifically the color #c9a961. Overlay this scene with the text that reads 'Formation Implantologie - 3 jours - 1500€'.

images.title: Catalogue Materiaux
images.revised_prompt: Create an image that simulates a luxury dental product advertisement. Depict premium dental materials and instruments elegantly laid out on a dark matte background with gold accent elements. The scene is set in a professional laboratory with subtle warm lighting. There is a text overlay that says 'Catalogue 2026 - Matériaux Premium'. The composition is modern and minimalist, and the art style is photorealistic.

images.title: Gestion Cabinet
images.revised_prompt: Create a promotional banner for a dental software. Visualize a bright, modern dental clinic with gold-trimmed furniture, reflecting a warm and inviting atmosphere. In the clinic, a smiling male dentist of Hispanic descent enthusiastically presents a clean interface dashboard on a tablet to his South Asian female colleague. The tablet screen displays medical analytics related to dental health. The banner carries the text overlay 'JADOMI - Gestion Cabinet Intelligente'. The overall design should be professional, approachable and photorealistic.

images.title: Congres ADF 2026
images.revised_prompt: Create a photorealistic, cinematic image of a poster for an upcoming dental conference. The stage in the design should be modern and elegant, filled with dramatic lighting and gold accents, suggesting an aura of innovation and prestige. The primary focus of the stage should a keynote speaker, a female South Asian dental professional, communicating to an eager audience of diverse dental professionals. The text overlay on the poster should read 'Congrès ADF 2026 - Paris'. A dynamic composition of these elements will emulate the essence of a prestigious convention.

images.title: Protheses Ceramique
images.revised_prompt: Advertise a dental laboratory service with an extremely precise, photorealistic image displaying a stunning ceramic dental prosthesis being crafted by skilled hands. The scene should convey a scientific and premium artistic feel. The background needs to be dark, contrasted with warm gold lighting highlighting the detail of the craftsmanship. Overlay text that reads "Prothèses Céramique - Excellence Française". Ensure an overall impression of elegance and detail.

images.title: Audience Ciblee
images.revised_prompt: Display an image of a young, confident female dentist of Middle-Eastern descent who is adeptly creating content on a laptop. The scene is set in a modern, minimalist dental office steeped in a warm, professional atmosphere enriched by golden accents. On the laptop screen, analytics charts are vividly displayed. The image is not only inspirational but also bathed in photorealistic, cinematic lighting, adding an invigorating level of dynamism. A text overlay is incorporated into the scene with the French words '42 000 dentistes - Audience vérifiée', speaking of audience verification in the realm of dentistry.
